## What changed

<!-- One or two sentences. What did you do, and what does the change look like to a user of the site? -->

## Why

<!-- One sentence. What problem does this fix, or what feature does it add? Link to a related issue if there is one. -->

## Screenshots

<!-- Required for UI changes (anything that changes the table, dialogs, header, or styles). Optional for data-only changes. Drag an image into this comment, or paste a link. -->

## Data source (required if you edited `src/chips.json`)

<!-- Apple newsroom URL, press release, or chip-specific page that confirms the value. PRs without a source will be asked to add one. -->

## Test plan

<!-- Check everything that applies. If you can't check one of these, leave it unchecked and explain in a comment. -->

- [ ] I ran `bun run test` locally and all tests pass
- [ ] I ran `bun run typecheck` locally and there are no type errors
- [ ] I ran `bun run lint` locally and there are no lint errors
- [ ] I ran `bun run build` locally and the build is clean
- [ ] I read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](./CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the change (required for code changes, not required for data-only changes)
